TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Bakir Izetbegović ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 6, Bakir Izetbegović, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1956) mrhuw Bosnia and herzegovina ta' misuw hya' ga Bakir Izetbegović, aring ryax tay 17 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya (qyanux nya) Bakir Izetbegović htagan beh sa Sarajevo. Bakir Izetbegović hiya ga icibang cipoq na laqi. kawas tay 1982-1992 Izetbegović cyux mtzyaw beh semong kmalay ngasal qasa. kawas tay 1983, Izetbegović ru Sebija Građević wal kokong la. cyux maki qutux kneril laqi, Jasmina lalu nya. pinqbaqan nya sraral mqwas biru maki Sarajevo pqwasan laqi cikuy. kawas tay 1981 tmasot hopa pqwasan biru beh Sarajevo. mintzyuwaw nya maki sa kawas 1991, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: βakir izetβeɣo*i* rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βakir izetβeɣo*i*, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw βos~ɕnia an* ħerzeɣo*ina taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa βakir izetβeɣo*i*, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qnxan nja (qjanux nja) βakir izetβeɣo*i* ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa s~ɕaraje*o. βakir izetβeɣo*i* ħija ɣa iʦ~ʨiβaŋ ʦ~ʨipoq na laqi. kawas~ɕ taj ****-**** izetβeɣo*i* ʦ~ʨjux mtzjaw βeħ s~ɕemoŋ kmalaj ŋas~ɕal qas~ɕa. kawas~ɕ taj ****, izetβeɣo*i* ru s~ɕeβija ɣra*e*i* wal kokoŋ la. ʦ~ʨjux maki qutux kneril laqi, *as~ɕmina lalu nja. pinqβaqan nja s~ɕraral mqwas~ɕ βiru maki s~ɕaraje*o pqwas~ɕan laqi ʦ~ʨikuj. kawas~ɕ taj **** tmas~ɕot ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru βeħ s~ɕaraje*o. mintzjuwaw nja maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
S.FORM: Bakir Izetbegović ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 6, Bakir Izetbegović, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1956) mrhuw Bosnia and herzegovina ta' misuw hya' ga Bakir Izetbegović, aring ryax tay 17 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya (qyanux nya) Bakir Izetbegović htagan beh sa Sarajevo. Bakir Izetbegović hiya ga icibang cipoq na laqi. kawas tay 1982-1992 Izetbegović cyux mtzyaw beh semong kmalay ngasal qasa. kawas tay 1983, Izetbegović ru Sebija Građević wal kokong la. cyux maki qutux kneril laqi, Jasmina lalu nya. pinqbaqan nya sraral mqwas biru maki Sarajevo pqwasan laqi cikuy. kawas tay 1981 tmasot hopa pqwasan biru beh Sarajevo. mintzyuwaw nya maki sa kawas 1991, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: βakir izetβeɣo*i* rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βakir izetβeɣo*i*, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw βos~ɕnia an* ħerzeɣo*ina taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa βakir izetβeɣo*i*, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qnxan nja (qjanux nja) βakir izetβeɣo*i* ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa s~ɕaraje*o. βakir izetβeɣo*i* ħija ɣa iʦ~ʨiβaŋ ʦ~ʨipoq na laqi. kawas~ɕ taj ****-**** izetβeɣo*i* ʦ~ʨjux mtzjaw βeħ s~ɕemoŋ kmalaj ŋas~ɕal qas~ɕa. kawas~ɕ taj ****, izetβeɣo*i* ru s~ɕeβija ɣra*e*i* wal kokoŋ la. ʦ~ʨjux maki qutux kneril laqi, *as~ɕmina lalu nja. pinqβaqan nja s~ɕraral mqwas~ɕ βiru maki s~ɕaraje*o pqwas~ɕan laqi ʦ~ʨikuj. kawas~ɕ taj **** tmas~ɕot ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru βeħ s~ɕaraje*o. mintzjuwaw nja maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
